title: Looking for Category Manager at HomeLane

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at HomeLane
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at HomeLane. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About HomeLane:
HomeLane is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HomeLane!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
